steps.title: Isolate the square root term
steps.content:
Subtract 34 from both sides of the equation:
$$\sqrt{w} + 34 - 34 = 40 - 34$$
$$\sqrt{w} = 6$$

steps.title: Square both sides to solve for w
steps.content:
To eliminate the square root, square both sides:
$$(\sqrt{w})^2 = 6^2$$
$$w = 36$$
That is the correct answer.
